title: Bengal's farmer-friendly initiative benefited 1.4 crore people: CM Mamata Banerjee
description: Under the scheme, beneficiaries receive ₹10,000 annually, while those with very small landholdings receive a minimum of ₹4,000. The amount is transferred directly to bank accounts in two instalments during the Kharif and Rabi seasons, says West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee
